resources.string: VPN is on. If this page does not work, turn VPN off and try again.
When logging in on the webpage, we\'ll display a confirmation popup in the app for added security.

Step 1: Connect your phone and computer to the same wireless network.

Method 1: Connect your computer and phone to the same Wi-Fi network.
Method 2: Turn on your phone's hotspot and connect your computer to the phone's hotspot.

Step 2: Open a web browser on your computer and enter the web address displayed on the APP homepage.
Port {{ port }} is occupied. Tap "Restart App" to fix it automatically.
Ports {{ port }} are occupied. Tap "Restart App" to fix it automatically.
The URL token encrypts data in URLs. If it\'s reset, old token-encrypted URLs become inaccessible.
When enabled, a new URL token is generated every time the app starts. This invalidates all previously generated file URLs. Recommended for advanced users who want stronger security.
Service failed to start. Please restart the app.
Service started but cannot be reached. A firewall or VPN app may be blocking localhost connections. Please check your network settings and restart the app.
To receive messages from others, please enable Phone Web Portal.

Clients must include both c-id: <client_id> and Authorization: Bearer <token> in the request headers, or use the same pair to encrypt the API payload. If the token is provided in the request headers, the response will be returned in plain text.
If you see \"Your connection is not private\" error, simply click the "Advanced" button and click "Proceed to …" button, then Chrome will trust this URL for the remainder of the browser session.
Microphone permission is disabled. Please enable it in Settings to mirror system audio.
Enter the above address in your computer\'s browser, ensuring that your phone and computer are on the same local network.
Service failed to start. Please restart the app.
The HTTP server has been intentionally stopped. To restart it, please tap the "Relaunch APP" button.
Almost done! Just tap "Relaunch APP" to take effect.
Access your phone from a computer browser.
Scan QR code to access web address
Access your phone from a computer browser
Start service to manage phone files from desktop.
Manage phone files from desktop on the same local network.
Make sure your computer and phone are on the same network
Open any address below in your computer\'s browser.
Use this token with ADB broadcasts to control PlainApp programmatically. Pass it as --es token <value>.
